subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-06-03
subcodes.first_line: In this glorious Tablet to the King of Persia Bahá'u'lláh has perfected His proof from every standpoint. There has been left for him no loophole... When his holiness Badi' reached Tihran he found the Shah was not in the city
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
